briefdescription.para: This function sets the scaling factors depending on the source video stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAVBuf instance.
is the register offset of the SF0 register from the DP BaseAddress.
Factors is a pointer to the scaling factors needed for scaling colors to 12 BPC.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the Layer Control for Video and Graphics layers.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAVBuf instance.
is the register offset of Video Layer or Graphics Layer from the base address
is a pointer to the XAVBuf_VideoAttribute struct which has been configured for the particular layer

briefdescription.para: This function applies Attributes for Live source(Video/Graphics).

parameterdescription.para: is an pointer to the XAVBuf Instance.
is a register offset for Video or Graphics config register
is a pointer to the attributes of the video to be applied

simplesect.para: Live source can be live Video or Live Graphics.

briefdescription.para: This function applies Attributes for Non - Live source(Video/Graphics).

parameterdescription.para: is an pointer to the XAVBuf Instance.
is the source of the Non-Live Video
is a pointer to the attributes of the video to be applied

simplesect.para: Non Live source can be Non Live Video or Non Live Graphics.

briefdescription.para: This function programs the coeffitients for Color Space Conversion.

parameterdescription.para: is an pointer to the XAVBuf Instance.
is a register offset for Video or Graphics config register
is a pointer to the XAVBuf_Attribute structure

briefdescription.para: This function converts the Blender output to the desired output format.

parameterdescription.para: is an pointer to the XAVBuf Instance.
is a register offset for Video or Graphics config register
is a pointer to the XAVBuf_Attribute structure

briefdescription.para: This function configures the Video Pipeline for the selected source.

parameterdescription.para: is an pointer to the XAVBuf Instance.
is a parameter which indicates which Video Source selected

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the configuration for the AVBuf Instance.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAVBuf instance.
sets the base address of the AVBuf instance
is the id of the device from the design.

simplesect.para: Base address and DeviceId is same as the DP Core driver.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes all the data structures of the XAVBuf Instance.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAVBuf instance.

briefdescription.para: This function selects the source for the Video and Graphics streams that are passed on to the blender block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAVBuf instance.
selects the stream coming from the video sources
selects the stream coming from the graphics sources

briefdescription.para: This function sets the video format for the non-live video.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAVBuf instance.
is the enum for the non-live video format

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if the correct format has been set. XST_FAILURE if the format is invalid.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the graphics format for the non-live video.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAVBuf instance.
is the enum for the non-live video format

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if the correct format has been set. XST_FAILURE if the format is invalid.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the video format for the live video.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAVBuf instance.
is the enum for the non-live video format

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if the correct format has been set. XST_FAILURE if the format is invalid.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the graphics format for the live video.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAVBuf instance.
is the enum for the non-live video format

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if the correct format has been set. XST_FAILURE if the format is invalid.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the Output Video Format.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAVBuf instance.
is the enum for the non-live video format

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if the correct format has been set. XST_FAILURE if the format is invalid.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the Audio and Video Clock Source and the video timing source.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAVBuf instance.
selects the Video Clock Source
selects the Audio Clock Source

simplesect.para: System uses PL Clock for Video when Live source is in use.

briefdescription.para: This function applies a soft reset to the Audio Video pipeline.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAVBuf instance.

briefdescription.para: This function looks up if the video format is valid or not for the non-live video datapath and returns a pointer to the attributes of the video.

parameterdescription.para: takes in the video format for which attributes are being requested.

simplesect.para: A pointer to the structure XAVBuf_VideoAttribute if the video format is valid, else returns NULL.

briefdescription.para: This function looks up if the video format is valid or not and returns a pointer to the attributes of the video.

parameterdescription.para: takes in the video format for which attributes are being requested.

simplesect.para: A pointer to the structure XAVBuf_VideoAttribute if the video format is valid, else returns NULL.

briefdescription.para: This function looks up if the video format is valid or not and returns a pointer to the attributes of the video.

parameterdescription.para: takes in the video format for which attributes are being requested.

simplesect.para: A pointer to the structure XAVBuf_VideoAttribute if the video format is valid, else returns NULL.

briefdescription.para: This function configures the Video Pipeline.

parameterdescription.para: is an pointer to the XAVBuf Instance.

briefdescription.para: This function configures the Graphics Pipeline.

parameterdescription.para: is an pointer to the XAVBuf Instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the blender background color.

parameterdescription.para: is an pointer to the XAVBuf Instance.
is a pointer to the structure XAVBuf_BlenderBgClr

briefdescription.para: This function enables or disables global alpha.

parameterdescription.para: is an pointer to the XAVBuf Instance.
sets a software flag for global alpha
sets the value for the global alpha blending

simplesect.para: GlobalAlphaEn = 1, enables the global alpha. GlobalAlphaEn = 0, disables the global alpha. Alpha = 0, passes stream2 Alpha = 255, passes stream1

briefdescription.para: This function configures the Output of the Video Pipeline.

parameterdescription.para: is an pointer to the XAVBuf Instance.

briefdescription.para: This function selects the source for audio streams corresponding to the Video and Graphics streams that are passed on to the blender.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAVBuf instance.
selects the audio stream source corresponding to the video source selected
selects the audio stream source corresponding to the graphics source selected.

briefdescription.para: This function sets up the scaling factor for Audio Mixer Volume Control.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAVBuf instance.
is the volume to be set for Audio from Channel0
is the volume to be set for Audio from Channel1

briefdescription.para: This function resets the Audio Pipe.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAVBuf Instance.

simplesect.para: Needed when non-live audio is disabled.

briefdescription.para: This function enables End of Line Reset for reduced blanking resolutions.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAVBuf Instance.
is to be set while using Reduced Blanking Resolutions.

briefdescription.para: This function enables the video channel interface between the DPDMA and the AVBuf.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAVBuf Instance.
sets the corresponding buffers.

briefdescription.para: This function enables the graphics interface between the DPDMA and the AVBuf.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAVBuf Instance.
sets the corresponding buffers.

briefdescription.para: This function enables the audio interface between the DPDMA and the AVBuf.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAVBuf Instance.
sets the corresponding buffers.

briefdescription.para: This function enables the audio interface between the DPDMA and the AVBuf.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAVBuf Instance.
sets the corresponding buffers.

briefdescription.para: This file implements all the functions related to the Video Pipeline of the DisplayPort Subsystem.

detaileddescription.para: See xavbuf.h for the detailed description of the driver.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 aad 06/24/17 Initial release. 2.0 aad 10/08/17 Some APIs to use enums instead of Macros. Some bug fixes. 2.2 aad 04/26/18 Fixed Warnings
